ci_support_linux_64_r_base4.4.yaml:
c_compiler:
- gcc
c_compiler_version:
- '14'
c_stdlib:
- sysroot
c_stdlib_version:
- '2.17'
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
cran_mirror:
- https://cran.r-project.org
cxx_compiler:
- gxx
cxx_compiler_version:
- '14'
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
pin_run_as_build:
  r-base:
    min_pin: x.x
    max_pin: x.x
r_base:
- '4.4'
target_platform:
- linux-64
zip_keys:
- - c_compiler_version
  - cxx_compiler_version

about.summary: Provides functions for analyzing and visualizing complex macroevolutionary dynamics on phylogenetic trees. It is a companion package to the command line program BAMM (Bayesian Analysis of Macroevolutionary Mixtures) and is entirely oriented towards the analysis, interpretation, and visualization of evolutionary rates. Functionality includes visualization of rate shifts on phylogenies, estimating evolutionary rates through time, comparing posterior distributions of evolutionary rates across clades, comparing diversification models using Bayes factors, and more.

Provides functions for analyzing and visualizing complex macroevolutionary dynamics on phylogenetic trees. It is a companion package to the command line program BAMM (Bayesian Analysis of Macroevolutionary Mixtures) and is entirely oriented towards the analysis, interpretation, and visualization of evolutionary rates. Functionality includes visualization of rate shifts on phylogenies, estimating evolutionary rates through time, comparing posterior distributions of evolutionary rates across clades, comparing diversification models using Bayes factors, and more.

name: r-bammtools

about.summary: Provides functions for analyzing and visualizing complex macroevolutionary dynamics on phylogenetic trees. It is a companion package to the command line program BAMM (Bayesian Analysis of Macroevolutionary Mixtures) and is entirely oriented towards the analysis, interpretation, and visualization of evolutionary rates. Functionality includes visualization of rate shifts on phylogenies, estimating evolutionary rates through time, comparing posterior distributions of evolutionary rates across clades, comparing diversification models using Bayes factors, and more.

raw_meta_yaml:
{% set version = '2.1.12' %}
{% set posix = 'm2-' if win else '' %}

package:
  name: r-bammtools
  version: "{{ version|replace('-', '_') }}"

source:
  url:
    - {{ cran_mirror }}/src/contrib/BAMMtools_{{ version }}.tar.gz
    - {{ cran_mirror }}/src/contrib/Archive/BAMMtools/BAMMtools_{{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: fe68e351a38a0b6e2d3bdf26835d72ce77e6be3555f92d45ed1c3a9a45b73242

build:
  number: 0
  rpaths:
    - lib/R/lib/
    - lib/
  missing_dso_whitelist:
    - '*/R.dll'        # [win]
    - '*/Rblas.dll'    # [win]
    - '*/Rlapack.dll'  # [win]

requirements:
  build:
    - {{ compiler('c') }}              # [not win]
    - {{ stdlib("c") }}                # [not win]
    - {{ compiler('m2w64_c') }}        # [win]
    - {{ compiler('cxx') }}            # [not win]
    - {{ compiler('m2w64_cxx') }}      # [win]
    - {{ posix }}filesystem        # [win]
    - {{ posix }}make
    - {{ posix }}sed               # [win]
    - {{ posix }}coreutils         # [win]
    - {{ posix }}zip               # [win]
    - cross-r-base {{ r_base }}    # [build_platform != target_platform]
  host:
    - r-base
    - r-rcpp >=0.11.0
    - r-ape
    - r-gplots
  run:
    - r-base
    - r-rcpp >=0.11.0
    - r-ape
    - r-gplots

test:
  commands:
    - $R -e "library('BAMMtools')"           # [not win]
    - "\"%R%\" -e \"library('BAMMtools')\""  # [win]

about:
  home: http://bamm-project.org/
  license: GPL-2.0-only
  summary: Provides functions for analyzing and visualizing complex macroevolutionary dynamics
    on phylogenetic trees. It is a companion package to the command line program BAMM
    (Bayesian Analysis of Macroevolutionary Mixtures) and is entirely oriented towards
    the analysis, interpretation, and visualization of evolutionary rates. Functionality
    includes visualization of rate shifts on phylogenies, estimating evolutionary rates
    through time, comparing posterior distributions of evolutionary rates across clades,
    comparing diversification models using Bayes factors, and more.
  license_family: GPL2
  license_file:
    - '{{ environ["PREFIX"] }}/lib/R/share/licenses/GPL-2'

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - conda-forge/r

# Package: BAMMtools
# Type: Package
# Title: Analysis and Visualization of Macroevolutionary Dynamics on Phylogenetic Trees
# Version: 2.1.12
# Authors@R: c( person("Dan", "Rabosky", role = c("aut")), person("Michael", "Grundler", role = c("aut")), person("Pascal", "Title", email = "ptitle@umich.edu", role = c("aut", "cre"), comment = c(ORCID = "0000-0002-6316-0736")), person("Carlos", "Anderson", role = c("aut")), person("Jeff", "Shi", role = c("aut")), person("Joseph", "Brown", role = c("aut")), person("Huateng", "Huang", role = c("aut")), person("Jon", "Mitchell", role = c("aut")))
# Imports: Rcpp (>= 0.11.0), gplots, methods
# Depends: ape, R (>= 2.10)
# Suggests: parallel
# Description: Provides functions for analyzing and visualizing complex macroevolutionary dynamics on phylogenetic trees. It is a companion package to the command line program BAMM (Bayesian Analysis of Macroevolutionary Mixtures) and is entirely oriented towards the analysis, interpretation, and visualization of evolutionary rates. Functionality includes visualization of rate shifts on phylogenies, estimating evolutionary rates through time, comparing posterior distributions of evolutionary rates across clades, comparing diversification models using Bayes factors, and more.
# License: GPL (>= 2)
# URL: http://bamm-project.org/
# NeedsCompilation: yes
# Encoding: UTF-8
# RoxygenNote: 7.3.2
# Packaged: 2024-09-12 19:59:57 UTC; pascaltitle
# Author: Dan Rabosky [aut], Michael Grundler [aut], Pascal Title [aut, cre] (<https://orcid.org/0000-0002-6316-0736>), Carlos Anderson [aut], Jeff Shi [aut], Joseph Brown [aut], Huateng Huang [aut], Jon Mitchell [aut]
# Maintainer: Pascal Title <ptitle@umich.edu>
# Repository: CRAN
# Date/Publication: 2024-09-12 22:10:47 UTC

about.summary: Provides functions for analyzing and visualizing complex macroevolutionary dynamics on phylogenetic trees. It is a companion package to the command line program BAMM (Bayesian Analysis of Macroevolutionary Mixtures) and is entirely oriented towards the analysis, interpretation, and visualization of evolutionary rates. Functionality includes visualization of rate shifts on phylogenies, estimating evolutionary rates through time, comparing posterior distributions of evolutionary rates across clades, comparing diversification models using Bayes factors, and more.
